signals.headline: South Korea's March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2
signals.raw:
South Korea's March 2026 Annual Inflation Confirmed at 2.2% YoY, Below Consensus of 2.3-2.4% | NO | HIGH confidence**

South Korea's consumer price index rose 2.2% year-on-year in March 2026, up from 2.0% in February but under market expectations of 2.3% (ING) or 2.4% (Trading Economics); monthly rise was 0.3% vs. 0.6% forecast[1][2]. Core inflation (excluding food/energy) fell to 2.2% from 2.3%,
matched_markets: Will South Korea’s 2026 Annual Inflation be between 2.7% and 2.9%?

signals.raw:
Based on the search results available, there is no breaking news of a major confirmation, announcement, or resolution that would significantly move prediction markets today.

The most recent confirmed developments are:

signals.headline: CLARITY Act Status | NO | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
CLARITY Act Status | NO | HIGH confidence**
The CLARITY Act markup has not yet occurred. The Senate Banking Committee was targeting a markup before the end of April, but this remains pending and has not been confirmed as scheduled.[1]

No major price-moving confirmations or resolutions have been announced as of this reporting time. The market is currently focused on potential catalysts in the comi

signals.headline: Rakuten Wallet XRP Listing | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Rakuten Wallet XRP Listing | YES | HIGH confidence**
Rakuten Wallet listed XRP for spot trading and payments on April 15, enabling 44 million Rakuten Pay users to convert loyalty points into XRP and spend it at over 5 million merchant locations across Japan.[1] This provides organic demand beyond speculation.
matched_markets: XRP Up or Down - April 17, 2:55PM-3:00PM ET

signals.headline: SEC Crypto Roundtable | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
SEC Crypto Roundtable | YES | HIGH confidence**
The SEC held a crypto roundtable meeting, which provided regulatory validation that institutions have been waiting on.[1]

signals.headline: XRP ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows | YES | HIGH confidence**
XRP investment products pulled in $119.6 million in net inflows for the week ending April 11, with most coming from European investors through Swiss exchange-traded products.[1] Additionally, $17.6 million in daily ETF inflows occurred on April 15.[4]
